pitchdeck_agent.markdown_deck:
# Solarex — Seed Round Pitch Deck

## Slide 1: Title
**Solarex** | *AI-powered CleanTech platform*

## Slide 2: Problem
CleanTech operators lose 20-35% efficiency from fragmented, non-AI tooling.

## Slide 3: Solution
Solarex delivers a unified AI platform — 10x faster decisions, 30% cost reduction.

## Slide 4: Market Size
- **TAM**: $200B global CleanTech market by 2030
- **SAM**: $18B addressable segment
- **SOM**: $500M in 5 years

## Slide 5: Product & MVP
Core AI Engine + Dashboard + API Integrations
Stack: FastAPI | React | PostgreSQL | Vertex AI

## Slide 6: Business Model
LTV:CAC = 12x | Payback: 3.8 months | Gross Margin: 74%
Year 1: $620K ARR | Year 2: $4.1M ARR | Year 3: $14.5M ARR

## Slide 7: Competition
| Competitor | Weakness | Our Edge |
|---|---|---|
| Legacy Leader Corp | No AI layer | AI-native from day 1 |
| NimbleStart | No data moat | Proprietary training data |

## Slide 8: Go-To-Market
Design partners → Content + SEO → Partner network
Month 1: 3 pilots | Month 2: 15 customers | Month 3: $50K MRR

## Slide 9: Financial Projections
| Year | ARR |
|---|---|
| Year 1 | $620K |
| Year 2 | $4.1M |
| Year 3 | $14.5M |

## Slide 10: The Ask
Raising **$1.8M Seed**
- Engineering 45% | Sales 30% | Compliance 15% | Ops 10%

Shift from point solutions to integrated platforms

opportunities: First-mover advantage in AI-native Supply Chain / SaaS tooling

risk_agent.reasoning: No existential regulatory or legal blockers identified.

user_stories: As a Supply Chain / SaaS operator, I want real-time AI insights so I can make faster decisions.
As an admin, I want a dashboard to monitor all system KPIs in one place.
As a developer, I want a REST API to integrate our existing tooling.

finance_agent.pricing_model_critique: Pricing is competitive for Supply Chain / SaaS; recommend a freemium-to-paid funnel to reduce friction.

three_year_projections.Year 1: $620K ARR — 150 paying customers at avg $4.1K ACV

advocate_agent.brutal_truth: SupplyFlow AI's biggest vulnerability is CAC creep. The $120 blended CAC assumes 60% inbound, but there is no content moat yet. If outbound dominates early, CAC could spike to $340 — collapsing the LTV:CAC to 4.2x. The incumbent competitor has 10x the sales force and could respond within 18 months.
critical_assumptions: Inbound/outbound channel mix holds at 60/40 (unvalidated)
Churn rate stays below 8% annually (no historical data)
Enterprise tier launches on schedule in Month 14

stress_test_results.CAC doubles: LTV:CAC drops to 6x; payback extends to 7.6 months; Year 2 ARR falls to $2.9M.
stress_test_results.Churn hits 15%: LTV collapses to $720; unit economics go negative at current CAC.
stress_test_results.Competitor enters: 25% pipeline reduction estimated; pivot to niche vertical needed.

strengths: LTV:CAC of 12x with 3.8-month payback — top-quartile SaaS metrics
Large and growing Supply Chain / SaaS market with regulatory tailwinds
No direct AI-native competitor identified at scale
concerns: CAC assumption unvalidated — inbound channel mix assumed, not proven
Enterprise tier roadmap creates execution risk in Year 2
Regulatory complexity varies by region — team capacity to manage unclear

growth_agent.acquisition_strategy: Launch with 5 design-partner customers in Supply Chain / SaaS to validate CAC. Month 1: hire SDR; build content playbook. Month 2: automate lead scoring with AI. Month 3: launch partner program targeting 3 system integrators.

Month 1: Launch content blog targeting 5 primary keywords
Month 2: File for data-processing compliance in primary market
Month 3: Begin Series A deck and investor outreach

simulator_agent.success_scenario: Month 12: 1,050 active customers, $315K MRR. CAC holds at $118. Churn at 6.5%. Series A closed at $9M.
simulator_agent.failure_scenario: Month 9: inbound channel dries up; CAC spikes to $310. MRR growth stalls at $174K. Pivot to vertical SaaS required. Runway extends 8 months with bridge round.

pitchdeck_agent.markdown_deck:
# SupplyFlow AI — Seed Round Pitch Deck

## Slide 1: Title
**SupplyFlow AI** | *AI-powered Supply Chain / SaaS platform*

## Slide 2: Problem
Supply Chain / SaaS operators lose 20-35% efficiency from fragmented, non-AI tooling.

## Slide 3: Solution
SupplyFlow AI delivers a unified AI platform — 10x faster decisions, 30% cost reduction.

## Slide 4: Market Size
- **TAM**: $200B global Supply Chain / SaaS market by 2030
- **SAM**: $18B addressable segment
- **SOM**: $500M in 5 years

## Slide 5: Product & MVP
Core AI Engine + Dashboard + API Integrations
Stack: FastAPI | React | PostgreSQL | Vertex AI

## Slide 6: Business Model
LTV:CAC = 12x | Payback: 3.8 months | Gross Margin: 74%
Year 1: $620K ARR | Year 2: $4.1M ARR | Year 3: $14.5M ARR

## Slide 7: Competition
| Competitor | Weakness | Our Edge |
|---|---|---|
| Legacy Leader Corp | No AI layer | AI-native from day 1 |
| NimbleStart | No data moat | Proprietary training data |

## Slide 8: Go-To-Market
Design partners → Content + SEO → Partner network
Month 1: 3 pilots | Month 2: 15 customers | Month 3: $50K MRR

## Slide 9: Financial Projections
| Year | ARR |
|---|---|
| Year 1 | $620K |
| Year 2 | $4.1M |
| Year 3 | $14.5M |

## Slide 10: The Ask
Raising **$1.8M Seed**
- Engineering 45% | Sales 30% | Compliance 15% | Ops 10%
